name: lv1-compass
description: Assistant + advisor for work. lv1-assistant makes trustworthy work deliverables (analysis, reports, memos, decks, models) through a claim-ledger research → draft → independent-inspection pipeline; lv1-advisor is an independent judge that reviews an artifact, challenges a position with a sourced steelman, or helps you decide a fork and leaves the choice with you. Both share one constitution and ship only work that is impressive AND true.
